items.name_en: Balenciaga's key Hourglass bag for this season. The unique, iconic curved silhouette is highly recognizable and eye-catching. items.name_en: Small Embroidered Black
items.name_cn:
Small Embroidered Black
Balenciaga New Monaco Series
The new season's Monaco is stunning. A joy for large bag lovers. The soft texture, versatile ways to wear, and practicality make it very easy to match.
It gives a very relaxed vibe.
A bag as soft as a pillow, satisfying various styling needs~
Model: 80026 Embroidery
Small Size: Base Length 27 x Width 9.9 x Height 18cm

items.name_en: Balenciaga Paris crush chain bag ⛓️ Classic hourglass silhouette but soft like a pillow, crumpled and unfolded vintage origami texture, timeless and versatile. The crush bag reinterprets the classic with deconstruction techniques, continuing the arched base and pointed edge design, removing handles, keeping the B buckle. Can loop the chain through the ring to fold as a handbag or clutch, or adjust to a single chain for shoulder or crossbody, one bag has four ways to wear. Model: 8911. Size: 39.9*24.9*13.0

The crush bag reinterprets the classic with deconstruction techniques, continuing the arched base and pointed edge design, removing handles, keeping the B buckle. Can loop the chain through the ring to fold as a handbag or clutch, or adjust to a single chain for shoulder or crossbody, one bag has four ways to wear. Model: 8911. Size: 39.9*24.9*13.0
